calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. AARON DAWSON, TEL. NO. 534-5346 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE SF NEWSPAPER COMPANY, LLC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT - This motion is off calendar. Insufficient service per CCP 1005, which requires at least 16 court days for notice of hearing and two additional calendar days if served by express mail. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, CIPS Marketing Group, Inc.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) S.F Newspaper Company, LLC,dba The San Francisco Examiner, a Corporation
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $35,299.80
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7%: $2,345.72
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $569.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $39,214.52
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
